questions.main_text:
**Cancel Culture Debate (video) 15 p.**

​

This is a video where some people debate about a statement related to a phenomenon called “cancel culture”, which means “the practice of no longer supporting people, especially celebrities, or products that are regarded as unacceptable or problematic” _(Macmillan Dictionary)_. You can play the video as many times as you want to. Read the questions and statements carefully and choose whose views each statement summarises the best. There is one extra statement that does not summarise anyone’s views.

​

**Material**

[LINK text=6.A Video: Cancel Culture Debate|url=https://yle.fi/plus/abitreenit/2022/Kevät/2022-03-21\_EA\_fi/index.html#6]

content.text:
**Cancel Culture Debate (video) 15 p.**

​

This is a video where some people debate about a statement related to a phenomenon called “cancel culture”, which means “the practice of no longer supporting people, especially celebrities, or products that are regarded as unacceptable or problematic” _(Macmillan Dictionary)_. You can play the video as many times as you want to. Read the questions and statements carefully and choose whose views each statement summarises the best. There is one extra statement that does not summarise anyone’s views.

​

**Material**

[LINK text=6.A Video: Cancel Culture Debate|url=https://yle.fi/plus/abitreenit/2022/Kevät/2022-03-21\_EA\_fi/index.html#6]

questions.main_text: Finally, [SELECT id=97] means that when individuals can see a stimulus more often, they’re more likely to prefer that stimulus. Businesses want to get their advertisements in front of your eyes as often as possible, so you build familiarity with their products and maybe even purchase them.

content.text: Finally, [SELECT id=97] means that when individuals can see a stimulus more often, they’re more likely to prefer that stimulus. Businesses want to get their advertisements in front of your eyes as often as possible, so you build familiarity with their products and maybe even purchase them.

questions.main_text: Advertisers use [SELECT id=97] to show that an item is popular and well-reviewed. If an ad highlights positive testimonials and reviews, or how many happy customers they have, they want to show you the common accord about their service or product. This makes you trust the advertiser and service or product more.

content.text: Advertisers use [SELECT id=97] to show that an item is popular and well-reviewed. If an ad highlights positive testimonials and reviews, or how many happy customers they have, they want to show you the common accord about their service or product. This makes you trust the advertiser and service or product more.

questions.main_text:
### Part 1: Listening Comprehension

Koe sisältää kuullunymmärtämisen tehtäviä.

content.text:
### Part 1: Listening Comprehension

Koe sisältää kuullunymmärtämisen tehtäviä.

questions.main_text:
Cam Faust said that he and fellow recreational fisher Kev Joiner heard Luke Voskresensky, 40, yell for help while they were setting crab traps from their dinghy in mangroves [GAP id=103] Darwin on Wednesday.

​

Faust said Voskresensky – who was covered in mud, cuts and insect bites – explained on Sunday that he [GAP id=104]  for four days, survived by eating snails and had used his clothes “for bits and pieces over the way”.

content.text:
Cam Faust said that he and fellow recreational fisher Kev Joiner heard Luke Voskresensky, 40, yell for help while they were setting crab traps from their dinghy in mangroves [GAP id=103] Darwin on Wednesday.

​

Faust said Voskresensky – who was covered in mud, cuts and insect bites – explained on Sunday that he [GAP id=104]  for four days, survived by eating snails and had used his clothes “for bits and pieces over the way”.

questions.main_text: Mikä estää joitakin australialaisia osallistumasta vapaaehtoistyöhön? (max 150 characters) 3 p.
questions.feedback:
He kokevat sille olevan esteitä. / He ajattelevat itse, etteivät voi osallistua. / Oletukset, että omat ominaisuudet

estävät osallistumisen. (3/0 p.)



OK: Olettavat, että vamma on este. (kaikkia esteitä ei tarvitse mainita)

OK: Pelko ennakkoluuloista. / Esteenä on pidetty vammaisuutta. (sisältää ajatuksen omasta kokemuksesta tai

siitä, että kyseessä on oletus)

EI TUO EI VIE: Ihmisten toiminnalliset rajoitteet, asuminen maaseudulla, alkuperäisväestöön kuuluminen ja

seksuaaliseen vähemmistöön kuuluminen. (puuttuu ajatus omasta käsityksestä)

EI TUO EI VIE: kehitysvamma / He ovat alaikäisiä.

EI: He kokevat itsensä huonoksi. / Näennäinen syrjintä

questions.main_text: The major religions of the Himalayan region are polytheistic and inclusive, [SELECT id=122] older folk beliefs and deities as time goes on. This yields a complex spiritual world full of magical beings and places that are [SELECT id=123] constant interaction with the landscape and affairs of people.

content.text: The major religions of the Himalayan region are polytheistic and inclusive, [SELECT id=122] older folk beliefs and deities as time goes on.
